ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures) for the instrument */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) for the instrument */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market Identifier Code (MIC) for the exchange */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last date and time the instrument data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the instrument at the given time */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the instrument at the given time */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the instrument at the given time */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the instrument at the given time */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss (PnL) of the instrument at the given time */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume at the given time */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price to account for corporate actions */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, file, database) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., ma_40, rsi_14) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the indicator was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend (e.g., weak, moderate, strong) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who selected the preference */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument selected by the user */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame selected by the user (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h) */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Indicator name selected by the user (e.g., ma_40, rsi_14) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was set */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_selected_instruments" (
  "selected_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selected instrument */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who selected the instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument selected by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instrument was selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selected_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selected_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selected_instruments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_selected_time_frames" (
  "selected_time_frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selected time frame */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who selected the time frame */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame selected by the user (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the time frame was selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selected_time_frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selected_time_frames_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_selected_indicators" (
  "selected_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selected indicator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who selected the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Indicator name selected by the user (e.g., ma_40, rsi_14) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the indicator was selected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selected_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selected_indicators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the security entry belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used in the password hashing */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
